ogTitle: Ballast Head vs Bangham: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ballast Head and Bangham.
heading: Ballast Head vs Bangham — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ballast Head, South Australia and Bangham, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ballast Head has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Bangham (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ballast Head or Bangham safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ballast Head has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Bangham scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ballast Head scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Bangham scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ballast Head or Bangham?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ballast Head has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.32% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
